name: Xuancheng Valin Precision Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Xuancheng Valin Precision Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells elevator counterweight blocks, elevator compensation cables, sheet metal products, and processed products and other machinery accessories in China and internationally. The company was formerly known as Xuancheng Hualing Elevator Parts Co., Ltd. Xuancheng Valin Precision Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is based in Lang Xi, China.
